payload.title: Broaden `trust fix` — cross-module/workspace resolution + mechanical safety fixes
payload.description: `trust fix` cleanly auto-inserts named args for in-crate R0042 calls (crates/trust-lower/src/lib.rs), and cross-crate via explicit TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH. Extend to: (a) cross-module/workspace callee resolution without manual index setup; (b) mechanical safety fixes — e.g. `.unwrap()` → `?` when the enclosing fn returns Result. We already emit structured fixes with applicability in the JSON output (trust-diag); wire the safe ones into `fix --write`.
